text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you've been granted the Moderator role. We're thrilled to have you helping keep things running smoothly. Head over to #mod-team to get started!
Welcome aboard, guide_sam! 🎉 You've been approved as an Event Helper — we're excited to have you supporting our community events. Check out #events to see what's coming up!

Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you're now a Member. Feel free to explore, introduce yourself in #introductions, and don't hesitate to ask if you need help!
Welcome, mentor_lina! 🎉 We're delighted to have you join as a Mentor. Your experience and guidance will be invaluable to our community members. Head over to #mentors to connect with the team!
